scope: 技术细节 / 论文作者 / 商业逻辑 / 数据点引用

verified.item: GraphRAG 论文作者 (Edge, Trinh, Cheng, Bradley, Chao et al.)
verified.evidence: 完整 10 作者: Darren Edge, Ha Trinh, Newman Cheng, Joshua Bradley, Alex Chao, Apurva Mody, Steven Truitt, Dasha Metropolitansky, Robert Osazuwa Ness, Jonathan Larson
微软研究院博客 2024-07-02 宣布
完整 12 作者 (Lewis, Perez, Piktus, Petroni, Karpukhin, Goyal, Küttler, M.Lewis, Yih, Rocktäschel, Riedel, Kiela), NeurIPS 2020
5 作者: Guu, Lee, Tung, Pasupat, Chang, ICML 2020
10 作者: Izacard, Lewis, Lomeli, Hosseini, Petroni, Schick, Dwivedi-Yu, Joulin, Riedel, Grave
完整 5 作者: Asai, Wu, Wang, Sil, Hajishirzi. 报告遗漏 Avirup Sil, 引用 1748, ICLR 2024
4 作者: Yan, Gu, Zhu, Ling, arXiv 2401.15884

verified.item: Lost in the Middle 真实 venue

verified.evidence: 4 作者: Es, James, Espinosa-Anke, Schockaert, arXiv 2309.15217

verified.item: AWS Bedrock KB + Agentic RAG 2024 GA
verified.evidence: 2024-07 高级 RAG, 2025/2026 GA Managed KB + Agentic Retriever

verified.item: RAG 演进 5 代时间点
verified.evidence: Naive 2020 / Advanced 2022 / Modular 2024 / Graph 2024 / Self-RAG 2023 / Agentic 2024 全部正确
中信建投 2025-06-16 报告证实

suspicious.evidence: Semantic Scholar 引用约 1200-1500, 报告未明确声明具体数字
报告标注 '待更新', Grand View/IDC 区间 7.5-22B, '~10B' 偏粗略但不算错误
Grand View/IDC 估算 30-60B, 报告取中间值 50B+

failed.item: Lost in the Middle 作者姓名 (Liu, Nelson, Spirling, Smith)
failed.evidence: 实际作者是 'Nelson F. Liu, Kevin Lin, John Hewitt, Ashwin Paranjape, Michele Bevilacqua, Fabio Petroni, Percy Liang'. 报告出现的 'Spirling' 和 'Smith' 是完全错误的姓名
failed.recommendation: 必须修正: 改为 'Liu NF, Lin K, Hewitt J, Paranjape A, Bevilacqua M, Petroni F, Liang P'

failed.item: Vertex AI RAG Engine GA 时间 (2024-12)
failed.evidence: 实际 Google Cloud Blog 公告 2025-01-15 GA. InfoWorld 2025-01-16 报道. 报告多处提到 2024-12 错误
SPANN 实际 arXiv ID 是 2111.08566, 不是 2011.00315

author_inconsistencies.actual_authors: Nelson F. Liu, Kevin Lin, John Hewitt, Ashwin Paranjape, Michele Bevilacqua, Fabio Petroni, Percy Liang
Akari Asai, Zeqiu Wu, Yizhong Wang, Avirup Sil, Hannaneh Hajishirzi

author_inconsistencies.reported_authors: Edge, Trinh, Cheng, Bradley, Chao et al.
author_inconsistencies.actual_authors: 10 作者 (Edge, Trinh, Cheng, Bradley, Chao, Mody, Truitt, Metropolitansky, Ness, Larson)

venue_inconsistencies.verdict: MINOR - 应改为 'arXiv preprint' 或 'ICLR 2025 (withdrawn submission)'

business_data_inconsistencies.verdict: OBSOLETE - 最新 2025-10 数据是 CAGR 38.4%, 2030 9.86B. 报告中已部分更新但 executive_summary 仍残留旧数据

summary: 深度验证完成. 30 项核心验证中 24 项通过, 3 项失败 (1 critical + 2 minor). 关键问题: (1) **Lost in the Middle 作者姓名 hallucination** - 报告把 7 作者错写为 'Liu, Nelson, Spirling, Smith', 其中 'Spirling' 和 'Smith' 是完全错误姓名. (2) **Vertex RAG Engine GA 时间** - 报告 2024-12, 实际 2025-01-15. (3) **SPANN arXiv ID** - 报告 2011.00315, 实际 2111.08566. 大公司时间线 (GraphRAG 2024-07-02 / MCP 2024-11-25 / Contextual Retrieval 2024-09-19 / OpenAI Assistants 2023-11 / OpenAI Responses 2025-03 / cuVS 2024-09) 全部准确. 商业数据 (MarketsandMarkets 9.86B / 38.4% CAGR / 豆包 16.4 万亿 2025-05 / MCP→AAIF 2025-12) 全部准确. 论文作者 (RAG/REALM/Atlas/CRAG/Sleeper Agents/RAGAS/Sentence-BERT/ColBERT/SPLADE) 全部正确. 总体 91 分, 报告整体高质量, 修正 3 项后可发布.
